The Marachekku Way

How We Press Our Oils

Every step is deliberate. Every oil is crafted with the same care as it has been for generations.

🌱

Source

Fresh, high-quality seeds and coconuts sourced directly from local Coimbatore farms

☀️

Sun Dry

Naturally sun-dried to optimal moisture — no heat chambers, no chemicals

⚙️

Cold Press

Slow-pressed in our wooden Marachekku at below 45°C to retain all nutrients

✨

Bottle & Deliver

Filtered, bottled fresh, and delivered to your doorstep within 48 hours

Why Auraah KB?

Health you can taste. Purity you can trust.

🏺

Traditional Marachekku Method

Our wooden cold-press technique has been used for centuries. No heat, no chemicals — just pure, natural extraction that preserves every drop of goodness.

🌿

Zero Additives, Zero Compromises

No bleaching, deodorizing, or refining. What goes in is seeds and coconut. What comes out is pure oil — nothing more, nothing less.

🌾

Farm-Fresh & Local

We partner directly with farmers in and around Coimbatore. Fresh ingredients = fresh oil, pressed to order for maximum potency.

📦

Bulk Orders Welcome

Running a restaurant, hotel, or business? We supply in bulk at wholesale rates. Call us to discuss your requirements.
